title: Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi on self-driving's future, changing business model, job displacement
description:
(0:00) Introducing Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi

(0:59) Uber's self-driving business: partnerships, market size, LiDAR vs computer vision, safety, distribution

(8:14) How self-driving impacts Uber's business model over time

(13:30) Other forms of transportation Uber could provide

(16:09) $20B stock buyback plan vs. investing in R&D and acquisitions, future of food

(21:03) Dara's pitch to Elon for bringing Tesla Robotaxis into Uber's network

(22:31) How Uber thinks about driver job displacement from self-driving

analysis.summary: Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi discusses the future of self-driving, its impact on Uber's business model, and potential job displacement. He also shares his pitch to Elon Musk for integrating Tesla Robotaxis into Uber's network. The conversation covers various aspects of Uber's business, including partnerships, market size, and investments in R&D.

takeaways.text: Uber is focusing on self-driving technology to improve safety and efficiency
Self-driving will significantly impact Uber's business model over time
Uber is exploring other forms of transportation, such as public transit and scooters
Dara Khosrowshahi pitched Elon Musk on integrating Tesla Robotaxis into Uber's network
Uber is considering the potential job displacement caused by self-driving technology
Uber has a $20B stock buyback plan, but may invest in R&D and acquisitions instead
Uber is thinking about the future of food delivery and its role in the company's business
Partnerships and collaborations are key to Uber's self-driving strategy

sentiment.notes: The conversation is generally positive, with a focus on the potential benefits of self-driving technology and Uber's future plans. However, the topic of job displacement is also discussed, which adds a note of caution.

notable_moments.description: Dara Khosrowshahi pitches Elon Musk on integrating Tesla Robotaxis into Uber's network
Discussion on potential job displacement caused by self-driving technology
